title: Marvelous Tridents
description: Replace your trident with multiple optional weapons. Replaces models, textures, sound effects and makes the trident entity animated. Inspired by Marvel and the Marvel Cinematic Universe. Works with OptiFine, or CIT Resewn + Custom Entity Models mod.
body:
# Marvelous Tridents

A **collection** of *trident-replacing resource packs* made by ***Szombie***, inspired by **Marvel**.

### (Requires: OptiFine 1.19+)
 

## You can:

- Showcase the resource pack in any format if you credit me.
- Share the resource pack with the Modrinth link.
- Use the resource pack on any server.
- Modify the resource pack for private use only!

## You can't:

- Claim the resource pack as your own.
- Modify the resource pack for public use.
- Reupload any contents of the resource pack to anywhere.
- Showcase or share the resource pack without properly crediting the author.

### WARNING: If you disregard ANY of the above statements, measures will be taken to prevent any kind of theft! I'll take every steps to get stolen packs removed from any site. Thank you for understanding.
 

## About & Credits

This resource pack aims to add most of the iconic throwable weapons from the **Marvel universe** to **Minecraft** as *tridents*. Some of these weapons are **NOT** performance-friendly, meaning you will get less FPS while using those *(for example: Stormbreaker)*.

## Contents:

- **Captain America's Shield:** Replaces the trident with Captain America's Shield. Renames "Trident" to "Vibranium Shield" in English language setting.
- **Mjolnir:** Replaces the trident with Mjolnir. Renames "Trident" to "Hammer" in English language setting.
- **Stormbreaker (Horizontal Spin):** Replaces the trident with Stormbreaker. Renames "Trident" to "Battleaxe" in English language setting.
- **Stormbreaker (Vertical Spin):** Replaces the trident with Stormbreaker. Renames "Trident" to "Battleaxe" in English language setting.
- **Thunderbolt:** Replaces the trident with Thunderbolt. Renames "Trident" to "Thunderbolt" in English language setting.
 

### Requirements: OptiFine 1.16.5+ or OptiFabric with working OptiFine 1.16.5+ or CEM mod.

## Installation, Information & Check your Settings
- Move the chosen .zip files to the "...\.minecraft\resourcepacks\" folder. In the game, activate the resource pack and you're good to go!
- You can only activate **ONE** of these **at once**! Only the **topmost resource pack** will be **active** if you activate multiple of them!
- In Options -> Video Settings -> Quality, set the Custom Entity Models to "On" in order for the resource pack to work properly!

## THANK YOU!

If you would like to **support me**, consider **subscribing** to my **YouTube** channel! You also have the option to donate me on **PayPal**.

### I really hope you'll enjoy the resource pack! Have fun!
